[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010111011 6
1 011001010 4
2 110011100 5
3 101000011 4
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 111001100 5
7 001100100 3

01 10 111101100 6
12 21 101100110 5
23 32 111100110 6
34 43 011111111 8
45 54 011111011 7
56 65 111011110 7
67 76 111011111 8
70 07 111001111 7

02 20 111101110 7
13 31 011100100 4
24 42 111111111 a
35 53 011001110 5
46 64 110111111 8
57 75 111001011 6
60 06 111011100 6
71 17 101100111 6

03 30 111001100 5 match 6
14 41 011111111 8
25 52 111101110 7
36 63 111011100 6
47 74 111111011 8
50 05 111001110 6
61 16 111111100 7
72 27 101100111 6

04 40 111111111 a
15 51 011101110 6
26 62 111111110 8
37 73 111000111 6
